nextToken.description: A token that indicates where the output should continue from, if a previous request did not show all results. To get the next results, make the request again with this value.

createdAt.description: The ISO-8601 timestamp when the certificate revocation list (CRL) was created.

crlArn.description: The ARN of the certificate revocation list (CRL).

crlData.description: The state of the certificate revocation list (CRL) after a read or write operation.

crlId.description: The unique identifier of the certificate revocation list (CRL).

enabled.description: Indicates whether the certificate revocation list (CRL) is enabled.

name.description: The name of the certificate revocation list (CRL).
